generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and a patriot, I've always believed in service to our country. But mandatory conscription? Let's be honest - our all-volunteer force has kept us safe for decades. Why risk our children's futures on an outdated system that could actually weaken our national security? We need smart defense policies, not blanket mandates that ignore the complexities of modern warfare. #NationalSecurity #MilitaryService
